---
title: "Week3_Workshop1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#Preliminaries 
##1- Introduction to Command-Line and RStudio
##2- Logging in
##3- The RStudio Web Interface
##4- Basic unix commands
##5- Unix file system
##6- So where am I?
##7- Unix command format
#Other useful unix commands
##1- Create directory
### new directory:mkdir command 
##2- Moving around
### Move to work in the command_line directory

#Learn about grep
##50 flags 
###1) -i -> case insensitive match 2) -n -> report line number of matches 3) -c -> report all files that contain the pattern 4) -w -> match whole words only

#Sequence File Formats
##Fasta vs Fastaq

```
